## Improvements

- Added smoother local mailbox browsing with older email loaded in the background.
- Added account-specific contact suggestions when composing email.
- Added controls for remote images, including trusted senders.
- Added a reset for local mail data that safely rebuilds the cache from Gmail.

## Fixes

- Improved multi-account mail, attachment, thread, and notification handling.
- Kept unread status and mail-list updates consistent during sync.
- Prevented stale background sync work from restoring cleared local mail data.
- Hardened attachment downloads and remote image loading.
- Preserved the selected app language and improved window-state restoration.
